etymology.description: 又(又) (yòu, "hand") + 𰀁(brush) = hand holding a brush -> writing brush
etymology.interpretation: The character 肀(yù) represents the action of holding and using a brush, depicted through the symbolic combination of a hand 又(又) and a brush 𰀁. This imagery aligns with its original reference to a writing brush, closely related to 筆(筆) (bǐ, "writing brush").
